base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of world_4_2_layout — a tile (level_layout) from 1985 super mario bros. Underground — warp-zone-secret-pipe accessible via running-jump on top of ceiling. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Underground — warp-zone-secret-pipe accessible via running-jump on top of ceiling; leads to warp-zones 6/7/8. Classic speedrun route.
